title: Crunchy British Wrap
description: A simple, flavorful wrap filled with crunchy and bitter ingredients, inspired by British cuisine.

ingredients.name: crunchy veggies
ingredients.notes: such as carrots or bell peppers

instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Cook the sliced onion until translucent.
Add the crunchy veggies and cook until tender.
Add the bitter greens and cook until wilted.
Warm the wrap in the pan for a few seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spooning the filling onto the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling.
Fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
